revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:October 22 (old lunar calendar)]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of October 22 (old lunar calendar)]]</includeonly>

'''旧暦10月22日'''は[[旧暦]][[10月 (旧暦)|10月]]の22日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先勝|先勝]]である。
== できごと == * [[延暦]]13年（[[794年]]_月_日） - 平安遷都。[[桓武天皇]]が長岡京から[[山背国]]の新都（[[平安京]]）に入京
== 誕生日 == * （[[1127年]]_月_日） - [[孝宗 (宋)|孝宗]]、[[南宋]]の2代皇帝（+ [[1194年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[承和]]9年（[[842年]]_月_日） - [[阿保親王]]、[[平城天皇]]の第一皇子・[[在原業平]]の父（* [[792年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
{{msg:旧暦360日}} *前日[[10月21日 (旧暦)|10月21日]] 翌日[[10月23日 (旧暦)|10月23日]] - 前月[[9月22日 (旧暦)|9月22日]] 翌月[[11月22日 (旧暦)|11月22日]] *新暦[[10月22日]]
{{msg:stub}}

revision.comment: robot Adding: [[zh:十月廿二]], [[zh-yue:十月廿二]]
[[User:Addbot|ボット]]: 言語間リンク 3 件を[[Wikipedia:ウィキデータ|ウィキデータ]]上の [[d:q840043]] に転記
1 revision imported: importing jawiki history before translation, of all the 12 lunar months

revision.text:
{{旧暦10月}} '''旧暦10月22日'''は[[10月 (旧暦)|旧暦10月]]の22日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先勝|先勝]]である。
== できごと == * [[延暦]]13年（[[ユリウス暦]][[794年]][[11月18日]]） - 平安[[遷都]]。[[桓武天皇]]が[[長岡京]]から[[山背国]]の新都（[[平安京]]）に入京
== 誕生日 == * [[建炎]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1127年]][[11月27日]]） - [[孝宗 (宋)|孝宗]]、[[南宋]]の2代皇帝（+ [[1194年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[承和 (日本)|承和]]9年（ユリウス暦[[842年]][[11月27日]]） - [[阿保親王]]、[[平城天皇]]第一皇子・[[在原業平]]の父（* [[792年]]） * [[慶長]]16年（グレゴリオ暦[[1611年]][[11月26日]]） - [[景轍玄蘇]]、[[臨済宗]]の僧（* [[1537年]]） * [[明和]]6年（グレゴリオ暦[[1769年]][[11月19日]]） - [[有栖川宮職仁親王]]、[[霊元天皇]]第17皇子、[[有栖川宮]]第5代当主（* [[1713年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|10|21|10|23|9|22|11|10|1022}}
[[Category:japanese lunar calendar]][[ja:10月22日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]]

revision.comment: idk what haoppened but removing and re-adding the template
Text replacement - "日'''は" to "--> is the Nth day of "
Moving from [[Category:Japanese Lunar Calendar]] to [[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
adding boilerplate intro to all the days

Text replacement - "旧暦}}" to "旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}"

{{Lunar October}} '''October 22 (Old Lunar Calendar)''' is the DAYX day of month {{ill|October (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the tradional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}}.
<!--== {{Lunar October}} ''October 22'''<!--Lunar October22 is the Nth day of [[10月 (旧暦)|Lunar October]]の22日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先勝|先勝]][[Category:先勝]]である。
--> == Events == * [[延暦]]13年（[[ユリウス暦]][[794年]][[11月18日]]） - 平安[[遷都]]。[[桓武天皇]]が[[長岡京]]から[[山背国]]の新都（[[平安京]]）に入京
== Births == * [[建炎]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1127年]][[11月27日]]） - [[孝宗 (宋)|孝宗]]、[[南宋]]の2代皇帝（+ [[1194年]]）
== Deaths == * [[承和 (日本)|承和]]9年（ユリウス暦[[842年]][[11月27日]]） - [[阿保親王]]、[[平城天皇]]第一皇子・[[在原業平]]の父（* [[792年]]） * [[慶長]]16年（グレゴリオ暦[[1611年]][[11月26日]]） - [[景轍玄蘇]]、[[臨済宗]]の僧（* [[1537年]]） * [[明和]]6年（グレゴリオ暦[[1769年]][[11月19日]]） - [[有栖川宮職仁親王]]、[[霊元天皇]]第17皇子、[[有栖川宮]]第5代当主（* [[1713年]]）
== Commemorations ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|10|21|10|23|9|22|11|10|1022}}

[[sn:October 22 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 10월 22일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 22 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月22日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 22일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 22 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月廿二]] [[zh:十月廿二]] [[en:draft:October 22 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar October}} '''October 22''' is the 22nd day of month {{ill|October (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}}13年（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|794|ja|794}} {{ill|November 18|ja|11月18日}}） – The capital was relocated during the Heian period; Emperor {{ill|Kanmu|ja|桓武天皇}} left Nagaoka-kyō for the new capital in Yamashiro (Heian-kyō).
== Births == * {{ill|Ken'en (Japan)|ja|建炎}}元年（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1127|ja|1127}} {{ill|November 27|ja|11月27日}}） – Emperor {{ill|Xiaozong (Song)|ja|孝宗}}, the second emperor of the Southern Song († {{ill|1194|ja|1194}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Shōwa (Japan)|ja|承和}}9年（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|842|ja|842}} {{ill|November 27|ja|11月27日}}） – Prince {{ill|Abo|ja|阿保親王}}, first son of Emperor {{ill|Heizei|ja|平城天皇}} and father of {{ill|Narihira|ja|在原業平}} (* {{ill|792|ja|792}}). * {{ill|Kōji (Japan)|ja|弘治}}3年（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1557|ja|1557}} {{ill|September 27|ja|9月27日}}） – Emperor {{ill|Go-Nara|ja|後奈良天皇}}, the 105th emperor (* {{ill|1496|ja|1496}}). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}}5年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1834|ja|1834}} {{ill|November 21|ja|11月21日}}） – {{ill|Sakai Tadayoshi (Isesaki Domain)|ja|酒井忠良 (伊勢崎藩主)}}, the lord of the Isesaki Domain (* {{ill|1808|ja|1808}}).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|21|10|23|9|22|11|10|1022}}

[[sn:October 22 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 22일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 22 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月22日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 22일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 22 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月廿二]] [[zh:十月廿二]] [[en:draft:October 22 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar October}} '''October 22''' is the 22nd day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Lunisolar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}} 13rd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|794|ja|794}} {{ill|November 18|ja|11月18日}} ） – The capital was relocated during the Heian period; Emperor {{ill|Kanmu|ja|桓武天皇}} left Nagaoka-kyō for the new capital in Yamashiro (Heian-kyō).
== Births == * {{ill|Ken'en (Japan)|ja|建炎}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1127|ja|1127}} {{ill|November 27|ja|11月27日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Xiaozong (Song)|ja|孝宗}} , the second emperor of the Southern Song († {{ill|1194|ja|1194}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Shōwa (Japan)|ja|承和}} 9th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|842|ja|842}} {{ill|November 27|ja|11月27日}} ） – Prince {{ill|Abo|ja|阿保親王}} , first son of Emperor {{ill|Heizei|ja|平城天皇}} and father of {{ill|Narihira|ja|在原業平}} (* {{ill|792|ja|792}} ). * {{ill|Kōji (Japan)|ja|弘治}} 3rd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1557|ja|1557}} {{ill|September 27|ja|9月27日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Go-Nara|ja|後奈良天皇}} , the 105th emperor (* {{ill|1496|ja|1496}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 5th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1834|ja|1834}} {{ill|November 21|ja|11月21日}} ） – {{ill|Sakai Tadayoshi (Isesaki Domain)|ja|酒井忠良 (伊勢崎藩主)}} , the lord of the Isesaki Domain (* {{ill|1808|ja|1808}} ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|21|10|23|9|22|11|10|1022}}

[[sn:October 22 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 22일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 22 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月22日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 22일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 22 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月廿二]] [[zh:十月廿二]] [[en:draft:October 22 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar October}} '''October 22''' is the 22nd day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}} 13rd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|794|ja|794}} {{ill|November 18|ja|11月18日}} ） – The capital was relocated during the Heian period; Emperor {{ill|Kanmu|ja|桓武天皇}} left Nagaoka-kyō for the new capital in Yamashiro (Heian-kyō).
== Births == * {{ill|Ken'en (Japan)|ja|建炎}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1127|ja|1127}} {{ill|November 27|ja|11月27日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Xiaozong (Song)|ja|孝宗}} , the second emperor of the Southern Song († {{ill|1194|ja|1194}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Shōwa (Japan)|ja|承和}} 9th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|842|ja|842}} {{ill|November 27|ja|11月27日}} ） – Prince {{ill|Abo|ja|阿保親王}} , first son of Emperor {{ill|Heizei|ja|平城天皇}} and father of {{ill|Narihira|ja|在原業平}} (* {{ill|792|ja|792}} ). * {{ill|Kōji (Japan)|ja|Kōji}} 3rd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1557|ja|1557}} {{ill|September 27|ja|9月27日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Go-Nara|ja|後奈良天皇}} , the 105th emperor (* {{ill|1496|ja|1496}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 5th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1834|ja|1834}} {{ill|November 21|ja|11月21日}} ） – {{ill|Sakai Tadayoshi (Isesaki Domain)|ja|酒井忠良 (伊勢崎藩主)}} , the lord of the Isesaki Domain (* {{ill|1808|ja|1808}} ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|21|10|23|9|22|11|10|1022}}

[[sn:October 22 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 22일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 22 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月22日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 22일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 22 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月廿二]] [[zh:十月廿二]] [[en:draft:October 22 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar October}} '''October 22''' is the 22nd day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}} 13rd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|794|ja|794}} {{ill|November 18|ja|11月18日}} ） – The capital was relocated during the Heian period; Emperor {{ill|Kanmu|ja|桓武天皇}} left Nagaoka-kyō for the new capital in Yamashiro (Heian-kyō).
== Births == * {{ill|Ken'en (Japan)|ja|建炎}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1127|ja|1127}} {{ill|November 27|ja|11月27日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Xiaozong (Song)|ja|孝宗}} , the second emperor of the Southern Song († {{ill|1194|ja|1194}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Shōwa (Japan)|ja|承和}} 9th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|842|ja|842}} {{ill|November 27|ja|11月27日}} ） – Prince {{ill|Abo|ja|阿保親王}} , first son of Emperor {{ill|Heizei|ja|平城天皇}} and father of {{ill|Narihira|ja|在原業平}} (* {{ill|792|ja|792}} ). * {{ill|Kōji (Japan)|ja|Kōji}} 3rd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1557|ja|1557}} {{ill|September 27|ja|9月27日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Go-Nara|ja|後奈良天皇}} , the 105th emperor (* {{ill|1496|ja|1496}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 5th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1834|ja|1834}} {{ill|November 21|ja|11月21日}} ） – {{ill|Sakai Tadayoshi (Isesaki Domain)|ja|酒井忠良 (伊勢崎藩主)}} , the lord of the Isesaki Domain (* {{ill|1808|ja|1808}} ). == See Also ==

[[sn:October 22 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 22일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 22 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月22日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 22일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 22 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月廿二]] [[zh:十月廿二]] [[en:draft:October 22 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar October}} '''October 22''' is the 22nd day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}} 13rd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|794|ja|794}} {{ill|November 18|ja|11月18日}} ） – The capital was relocated during the Heian period; Emperor {{ill|Kanmu|ja|桓武天皇}} left Nagaoka-kyō for the new capital in Yamashiro (Heian-kyō).
== Births == * {{ill|Ken'en (Japan)|ja|建炎}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1127|ja|1127}} {{ill|November 27|ja|11月27日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Xiaozong (Song)|ja|孝宗}} , the second emperor of the Southern Song († {{ill|1194|ja|1194}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Shōwa (Japan)|ja|承和}} 9th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|842|ja|842}} {{ill|November 27|ja|11月27日}} ） – Prince {{ill|Abo|ja|阿保親王}} , first son of Emperor {{ill|Heizei|ja|平城天皇}} and father of {{ill|Narihira|ja|在原業平}} (* {{ill|792|ja|792}} ). * {{ill|Kōji (Japan)|ja|Kōji}} 3rd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1557|ja|1557}} {{ill|September 27|ja|9月27日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Go-Nara|ja|後奈良天皇}} , the 105th emperor (* {{ill|1496|ja|1496}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 5th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1834|ja|1834}} {{ill|November 21|ja|11月21日}} ） – {{ill|Sakai Tadayoshi (Isesaki Domain)|ja|酒井忠良 (伊勢崎藩主)}} , the lord of the Isesaki Domain (* {{ill|1808|ja|1808}} ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|21|10|23|9|22|11|10|1022}}

== Deaths == * {{ill|Shōwa (Japan)|ja|承和}} 9th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|842|ja|842}} {{ill|November 27|ja|11月27日}} ） – Prince {{ill|Abo|ja|阿保親王}} , first son of Emperor {{ill|Heizei|ja|平城天皇}} and father of {{ill|Narihira|ja|在原業平}} (* {{ill|792|ja|792}} ). * {{ill|Kōji (Japan)|ja|Kōji}} 3rd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1557|ja|1557}} {{ill|September 27|ja|9月27日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Go-Nara|ja|後奈良天皇}} , the 105th emperor (* {{ill|1496|ja|1496}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 5th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1834|ja|1834}} {{ill|November 21|ja|11月21日}} ） – {{ill|Sakai Tadayoshi (Isesaki Domain)|ja|酒井忠良 (伊勢崎藩主)}} , the lord of the Isesaki Domain (* {{ill|1808|ja|1808}} ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|21|10|23|9|22|11|10|1022}}

[[sn:October 22 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 22일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 22 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月22日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 22일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 22 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月廿二]] [[zh:十月廿二]] [[en:draft:October 22 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar October}} '''October 22''' is the 22nd day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}} 13rd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|794|ja|794}} {{ill|November 18|ja|11月18日}} ） – The capital was relocated during the Heian period; Emperor {{ill|Kanmu|ja|桓武天皇}} left Nagaoka-kyō for the new capital in Yamashiro (Heian-kyō).
== Births == * {{ill|Ken'en (Japan)|ja|建炎}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1127|ja|1127}} {{ill|November 27|ja|11月27日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Xiaozong (Song)|ja|孝宗}} , the second emperor of the Southern Song († {{ill|1194|ja|1194}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Shōwa (Japan)|ja|承和}} 9th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|842|ja|842}} {{ill|November 27|ja|11月27日}} ） – Prince {{ill|Abo|ja|阿保親王}} , first son of Emperor {{ill|Heizei|ja|平城天皇}} and father of {{ill|Narihira|ja|在原業平}} (* {{ill|792|ja|792}} ). * {{ill|Kōji (Japan)|ja|Kōji}} 3rd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1557|ja|1557}} {{ill|September 27|ja|9月27日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Go-Nara|ja|後奈良天皇}} , the 105th emperor (* {{ill|1496|ja|1496}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 5th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1834|ja|1834}} {{ill|November 21|ja|11月21日}} ） – {{ill|Sakai Tadayoshi (Isesaki Domain)|ja|酒井忠良 (伊勢崎藩主)}} , the lord of the Isesaki Domain (* {{ill|1808|ja|1808}} ).
== See Also ==

[[cdo:10 nguŏk 22 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 22 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月廿二]] {{Lunisolar October}} '''October 22''' is the 22nd day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki|12=draft|12=draft}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝|12=draft|12=draft}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦|12=draft|12=draft}} 13rd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|794|ja|794|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 18|ja|11月18日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – The capital was relocated during the Heian period; Emperor {{ill|Kanmu|ja|桓武天皇|12=draft|12=draft}} left Nagaoka-kyō for the new capital in Yamashiro (Heian-kyō).
== Births == * {{ill|Ken'en (Japan)|ja|建炎|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1127|ja|1127|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 27|ja|11月27日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Xiaozong (Song)|ja|孝宗|12=draft|12=draft}} , the second emperor of the Southern Song († {{ill|1194|ja|1194|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Shōwa (Japan)|ja|承和|12=draft|12=draft}} 9th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|842|ja|842|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 27|ja|11月27日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – Prince {{ill|Abo|ja|阿保親王|12=draft|12=draft}} , first son of Emperor {{ill|Heizei|ja|平城天皇|12=draft|12=draft}} and father of {{ill|Narihira|ja|在原業平|12=draft|12=draft}} (* {{ill|792|ja|792|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Kōji (Japan)|ja|Kōji|12=draft|12=draft}} 3rd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1557|ja|1557|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|September 27|ja|9月27日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Go-Nara|ja|後奈良天皇|12=draft|12=draft}} , the 105th emperor (* {{ill|1496|ja|1496|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保|12=draft|12=draft}} 5th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1834|ja|1834|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 21|ja|11月21日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Sakai Tadayoshi (Isesaki Domain)|ja|酒井忠良 (伊勢崎藩主)|12=draft|12=draft}} , the lord of the Isesaki Domain (* {{ill|1808|ja|1808|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|21|10|23|9|22|11|10|1022}}
{{cdo:10 nguŏk 22 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)}} {{zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 22 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)}} {{zh-yue:十月廿二}} {{zh:十月廿二}}
{{cdo:10 nguŏk 22 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)}} {{zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 22 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)}} {{zh-yue:十月廿二}} {{zh:十月廿二}} ==References== {{reflist}} {{Japanese Traditional Lunisolar Months}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] [[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]] [[Category:Lunisolar October]] [[Category:Senshō]] [[Category:Days 22 of Japanese Lunar months]] [[Category:Lunisolar]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:500 shortest pages as of 03-29-2025]] }} [[sn:October 22 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 22일]] [[ja:10月22日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:十月廿二]] [[en:draft:October 22 (Lunisolar)]]

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:10 nguŏk 22 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:10月22日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 10월 22일]][[zh_min_nan:10 goe̍h 22 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:十月廿二]][[zh:十月廿二]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q840043]] Wikidata name: 22nd day of the 10th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:41, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|October 22|qq=October 22}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月廿二|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 22일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 22''' is the 22nd day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|qid=Q96759839}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 13rd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:794|794]] [[:en:November 18|November 18]] ） – The capital was relocated during the Heian period; Emperor [[:en:Emperor Kanmu|Kanmu]] left Nagaoka-kyō for the new capital in Yamashiro (Heian-kyō). == Births == * {{ill|Ken'en (Japan)|ja|建炎|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ken'en (Japan)|qq=|1=Jianyan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11065468}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1127|1127]] [[:en:November 27|November 27]] ） – Emperor {{ill|Xiaozong (Song)|ja|孝宗|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xiaozong (Song)|qq=|1=Xiaozong (Song)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1207540}} , the second emperor of the Southern Song († [[:en:1194|1194]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Jōwa|Shōwa (Japan)]] 9th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:842|842]] [[:en:November 27|November 27]] ） – Prince [[:en:Prince Abo|Abo]] , first son of Emperor [[:en:Emperor Heizei|Heizei]] and father of [[:en:Ariwara no Narihira|Narihira]] (* [[:en:792|792]] ). * [[:en:Kōji (Muromachi period)|Kōji]] 3rd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1557|1557]] [[:en:September 27|September 27]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Go-Nara|Go-Nara]] , the 105th emperor (* [[:en:1496|1496]] ). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 5th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1834|1834]] [[:en:November 21|November 21]] ） – {{ill|Sakai Tadayoshi (Isesaki Domain)|ja|酒井忠良 (伊勢崎藩主)|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sakai Tadayoshi (Isesaki Domain)|qq=|1=Sakai Tadakata|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11644167}} , the lord of the Isesaki Domain (* [[:en:1808|1808]] ).

== Events == * [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 13rd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:794|794]] [[:en:November 18|November 18]] ） – The capital was relocated during the Heian period; Emperor [[:en:Emperor Kanmu|Kanmu]] left Nagaoka-kyō for the new capital in Yamashiro (Heian-kyō). == Births == * {{ill|Ken'en (Japan)|ja|建炎|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ken'en (Japan)|qq=|1=Jianyan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11065468}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1127|1127]] [[:en:November 27|November 27]] ） – Emperor {{ill|Xiaozong (Song)|ja|孝宗|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xiaozong (Song)|qq=|1=Xiaozong (Song)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1207540}} , the second emperor of the Southern Song († [[:en:1194|1194]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Jōwa|Shōwa (Japan)]] 9th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:842|842]] [[:en:November 27|November 27]] ） – Prince [[:en:Prince Abo|Abo]] , first son of Emperor [[:en:Emperor Heizei|Heizei]] and father of [[:en:Ariwara no Narihira|Narihira]] (* [[:en:792|792]] ). * [[:en:Kōji (Muromachi period)|Kōji]] 3rd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1557|1557]] [[:en:September 27|September 27]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Go-Nara|Go-Nara]] , the 105th emperor (* [[:en:1496|1496]] ). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 5th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1834|1834]] [[:en:November 21|November 21]] ） – {{ill|Sakai Tadayoshi (Isesaki Domain)|ja|酒井忠良 (伊勢崎藩主)|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sakai Tadayoshi (Isesaki Domain)|qq=|1=Sakai Tadakata|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11644167}} , the lord of the Isesaki Domain (* [[:en:1808|1808]] ).

== Events == * [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 13rd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:794|794]] [[:en:November 18|November 18]] ） – The capital was relocated during the Heian period; Emperor [[:en:Emperor Kanmu|Kanmu]] left Nagaoka-kyō for the new capital in Yamashiro (Heian-kyō). == Births == * {{ill|Ken'en (Japan)|ja|建炎|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ken'en (Japan)|qq=|1=Jianyan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11065468}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1127|1127]] [[:en:November 27|November 27]] ） – Emperor {{ill|Xiaozong (Song)|ja|孝宗|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xiaozong (Song)|qq=|1=Xiaozong (Song)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1207540}} , the second emperor of the Southern Song († [[:en:1194|1194]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Jōwa|Shōwa (Japan)]] 9th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:842|842]] [[:en:November 27|November 27]] ） – Prince [[:en:Prince Abo|Abo]] , first son of Emperor [[:en:Emperor Heizei|Heizei]] and father of [[:en:Ariwara no Narihira|Narihira]] (* [[:en:792|792]] ). * [[:en:Kōji (Muromachi period)|Kōji]] 3rd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1557|1557]] [[:en:September 27|September 27]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Go-Nara|Go-Nara]] , the 105th emperor (* [[:en:1496|1496]] ). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 5th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1834|1834]] [[:en:November 21|November 21]] ） – {{ill|Sakai Tadayoshi (Isesaki Domain)|ja|酒井忠良 (伊勢崎藩主)|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sakai Tadayoshi (Isesaki Domain)|qq=|1=Sakai Tadakata|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11644167}} , the lord of the Isesaki Domain (* [[:en:1808|1808]] ).

== Events == * [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 13rd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:794|794]] [[:en:November 18|November 18]] ） – The capital was relocated during the Heian period; Emperor [[:en:Emperor Kanmu|Kanmu]] left Nagaoka-kyō for the new capital in Yamashiro (Heian-kyō). == Births == * {{ill|Ken'en (Japan)|ja|建炎|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ken'en (Japan)|1=Jianyan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11065468}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1127|1127]] [[:en:November 27|November 27]] ） – Emperor {{ill|Xiaozong (Song)|ja|孝宗|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xiaozong (Song)|1=Xiaozong (Song)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1207540}} , the second emperor of the Southern Song († [[:en:1194|1194]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Jōwa|Shōwa (Japan)]] 9th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:842|842]] [[:en:November 27|November 27]] ） – Prince [[:en:Prince Abo|Abo]] , first son of Emperor [[:en:Emperor Heizei|Heizei]] and father of [[:en:Ariwara no Narihira|Narihira]] (* [[:en:792|792]] ). * [[:en:Kōji (Muromachi period)|Kōji]] 3rd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1557|1557]] [[:en:September 27|September 27]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Go-Nara|Go-Nara]] , the 105th emperor (* [[:en:1496|1496]] ). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 5th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1834|1834]] [[:en:November 21|November 21]] ） – {{ill|Sakai Tadayoshi (Isesaki Domain)|ja|酒井忠良 (伊勢崎藩主)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sakai Tadayoshi (Isesaki Domain)|1=Sakai Tadakata|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11644167}} , the lord of the Isesaki Domain (* [[:en:1808|1808]] ).

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:10 nguŏk 22 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:10月22日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 10월 22일]][[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 22 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十月廿二]][[zh:十月廿二]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840043]] Wikidata name: 22nd day of the 10th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:41, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|October 22|qq=October 22}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月廿二|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 22일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 22''' is the 22nd day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|WD=Q96759839}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 13rd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:794|794]] [[:en:November 18|November 18]] ） – The capital was relocated during the Heian period; Emperor [[:en:Emperor Kanmu|Kanmu]] left Nagaoka-kyō for the new capital in Yamashiro (Heian-kyō). == Births == * {{ill|Ken'en (Japan)|ja|建炎|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ken'en (Japan)|1=Jianyan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11065468}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1127|1127]] [[:en:November 27|November 27]] ） – Emperor {{ill|Xiaozong (Song)|ja|孝宗|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xiaozong (Song)|1=Xiaozong (Song)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1207540}} , the second emperor of the Southern Song († [[:en:1194|1194]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Jōwa|Shōwa (Japan)]] 9th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:842|842]] [[:en:November 27|November 27]] ） – Prince [[:en:Prince Abo|Abo]] , first son of Emperor [[:en:Emperor Heizei|Heizei]] and father of [[:en:Ariwara no Narihira|Narihira]] (* [[:en:792|792]] ). * [[:en:Kōji (Muromachi period)|Kōji]] 3rd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1557|1557]] [[:en:September 27|September 27]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Go-Nara|Go-Nara]] , the 105th emperor (* [[:en:1496|1496]] ). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 5th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1834|1834]] [[:en:November 21|November 21]] ） – {{ill|Sakai Tadayoshi (Isesaki Domain)|ja|酒井忠良 (伊勢崎藩主)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sakai Tadayoshi (Isesaki Domain)|1=Sakai Tadakata|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11644167}} , the lord of the Isesaki Domain (* [[:en:1808|1808]] ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|21|10|23|9|22|11|10|1022|qq=}}

{{cdo:10 nguŏk 22 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)|qq=}} {{zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 22 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)|qq=}} {{zh-yue:十月廿二|qq=}} {{zh:十月廿二|qq=}} ==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:10 nguŏk 22 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:10月22日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 10월 22일]][[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 22 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十月廿二]][[zh:十月廿二]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840043]] Wikidata name: 22nd day of the 10th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:41, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|October 22|qq=October 22}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月廿二|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 22일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 22''' is the 22nd day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|WD=Q96759839}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 13rd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:794|794]] [[:en:November 18|November 18]] ） – The capital was relocated during the Heian period; Emperor [[:en:Emperor Kanmu|Kanmu]] left Nagaoka-kyō for the new capital in Yamashiro (Heian-kyō). == Births == * {{ill|Ken'en (Japan)|ja|建炎|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ken'en (Japan)|1=Jianyan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11065468}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1127|1127]] [[:en:November 27|November 27]] ） – Emperor {{ill|Xiaozong (Song)|ja|孝宗|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xiaozong (Song)|1=Xiaozong (Song)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1207540}} , the second emperor of the Southern Song († [[:en:1194|1194]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Jōwa|Shōwa (Japan)]] 9th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:842|842]] [[:en:November 27|November 27]] ） – Prince [[:en:Prince Abo|Abo]] , first son of Emperor [[:en:Emperor Heizei|Heizei]] and father of [[:en:Ariwara no Narihira|Narihira]] (* [[:en:792|792]] ). * [[:en:Kōji (Muromachi period)|Kōji]] 3rd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1557|1557]] [[:en:September 27|September 27]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Go-Nara|Go-Nara]] , the 105th emperor (* [[:en:1496|1496]] ). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 5th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1834|1834]] [[:en:November 21|November 21]] ） – {{ill|Sakai Tadayoshi (Isesaki Domain)|ja|酒井忠良 (伊勢崎藩主)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sakai Tadayoshi (Isesaki Domain)|1=Sakai Tadakata|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11644167}} , the lord of the Isesaki Domain (* [[:en:1808|1808]] ).
== See Also ==

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:10 nguŏk 22 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:10月22日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 10월 22일]][[zh_min_nan:10 goe̍h 22 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:十月廿二]][[zh:十月廿二]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:10 nguŏk 22 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:10月22日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 10월 22일]][[zh_min_nan:10 goe̍h 22 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:十月廿二]][[zh:十月廿二]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:10 nguŏk 22 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:10月22日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 10월 22일]][[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 22 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十月廿二]][[zh:十月廿二]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840043]] Wikidata name: 22nd day of the 10th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:41, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|October 22|qq=October 22}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月廿二|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 22일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 22''' is the 22nd day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|WD=Q96759839}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 13rd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:794|794]] [[:en:November 18|November 18]] ） – The capital was relocated during the Heian period; Emperor [[:en:Emperor Kanmu|Kanmu]] left Nagaoka-kyō for the new capital in Yamashiro (Heian-kyō). == Births == * {{ill|Ken'en (Japan)|ja|建炎|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ken'en (Japan)|1=Jianyan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11065468}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1127|1127]] [[:en:November 27|November 27]] ） – Emperor {{ill|Xiaozong (Song)|ja|孝宗|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xiaozong (Song)|1=Xiaozong (Song)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1207540}} , the second emperor of the Southern Song († [[:en:1194|1194]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Jōwa|Shōwa (Japan)]] 9th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:842|842]] [[:en:November 27|November 27]] ） – Prince [[:en:Prince Abo|Abo]] , first son of Emperor [[:en:Emperor Heizei|Heizei]] and father of [[:en:Ariwara no Narihira|Narihira]] (* [[:en:792|792]] ). * [[:en:Kōji (Muromachi period)|Kōji]] 3rd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1557|1557]] [[:en:September 27|September 27]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Go-Nara|Go-Nara]] , the 105th emperor (* [[:en:1496|1496]] ). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 5th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1834|1834]] [[:en:November 21|November 21]] ） – {{ill|Sakai Tadayoshi (Isesaki Domain)|ja|酒井忠良 (伊勢崎藩主)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sakai Tadayoshi (Isesaki Domain)|1=Sakai Tadakata|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11644167}} , the lord of the Isesaki Domain (* [[:en:1808|1808]] ).
== See Also ==

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|WD=Q96759839}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 13rd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:794|794]] [[:en:November 18|November 18]] ） – The capital was relocated during the Heian period; Emperor [[:en:Emperor Kanmu|Kanmu]] left Nagaoka-kyō for the new capital in Yamashiro (Heian-kyō). == Births == * {{ill|Ken'en (Japan)|ja|建炎|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ken'en (Japan)|1=Jianyan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11065468}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1127|1127]] [[:en:November 27|November 27]] ） – Emperor {{ill|Xiaozong (Song)|ja|孝宗|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xiaozong (Song)|1=Xiaozong (Song)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1207540}} , the second emperor of the Southern Song († [[:en:1194|1194]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Jōwa|Shōwa (Japan)]] 9th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:842|842]] [[:en:November 27|November 27]] ） – Prince [[:en:Prince Abo|Abo]] , first son of Emperor [[:en:Emperor Heizei|Heizei]] and father of [[:en:Ariwara no Narihira|Narihira]] (* [[:en:792|792]] ). * [[:en:Kōji (Muromachi period)|Kōji]] 3rd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1557|1557]] [[:en:September 27|September 27]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Go-Nara|Go-Nara]] , the 105th emperor (* [[:en:1496|1496]] ). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 5th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1834|1834]] [[:en:November 21|November 21]] ） – {{ill|Sakai Tadayoshi (Isesaki Domain)|ja|酒井忠良 (伊勢崎藩主)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sakai Tadayoshi (Isesaki Domain)|1=Sakai Tadakata|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11644167}} , the lord of the Isesaki Domain (* [[:en:1808|1808]] ).

== Deaths == * {{ill|Jōwa|en|Jōwa|WD=Q3577279|lt=Shōwa (Japan)}} 9th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|842|en|842|WD=Q24730|lt=842}} {{ill|November 27|en|November 27|WD=Q3018|lt=November 27}} ） – Prince {{ill|Prince Abo|en|Prince Abo|WD=Q11657231|lt=Abo}} , first son of Emperor {{ill|Emperor Heizei|en|Emperor Heizei|WD=Q353558|lt=Heizei}} and father of {{ill|Ariwara no Narihira|en|Ariwara no Narihira|WD=Q451991|lt=Narihira}} (* {{ill|792|en|792|WD=Q31116|lt=792}} ). * {{ill|Kōji (Muromachi period)|en|Kōji (Muromachi period)|WD=Q1143910|lt=Kōji}} 3rd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1557|en|1557|WD=Q6595|lt=1557}} {{ill|September 27|en|September 27|WD=Q2884|lt=September 27}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Emperor Go-Nara|en|Emperor Go-Nara|WD=Q349467|lt=Go-Nara}} , the 105th emperor (* {{ill|1496|en|1496|WD=Q6699|lt=1496}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|WD=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō}} 5th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1834|en|1834|WD=Q7591|lt=1834}} {{ill|November 21|en|November 21|WD=Q3023|lt=November 21}} ） – {{ill|Sakai Tadayoshi (Isesaki Domain)|ja|酒井忠良 (伊勢崎藩主)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sakai Tadayoshi (Isesaki Domain)|1=Sakai Tadakata|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11644167}} , the lord of the Isesaki Domain (* {{ill|1808|en|1808|WD=Q6914|lt=1808}} ).

== Deaths == * {{ill|Jōwa|en|Jōwa|WD=Q3577279|lt=Shōwa (Japan)|1=Jōwa}} 9th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|842|en|842|WD=Q24730|lt=842|1=842}} {{ill|November 27|en|November 27|WD=Q3018|lt=November 27|1=November 27}} ） – Prince {{ill|Prince Abo|en|Prince Abo|WD=Q11657231|lt=Abo|1=Prince Abo}} , first son of Emperor {{ill|Emperor Heizei|en|Emperor Heizei|WD=Q353558|lt=Heizei|1=Emperor Heizei}} and father of {{ill|Ariwara no Narihira|en|Ariwara no Narihira|WD=Q451991|lt=Narihira|1=Ariwara no Narihira}} (* {{ill|792|en|792|WD=Q31116|lt=792|1=792}} ). * {{ill|Kōji (Muromachi period)|en|Kōji (Muromachi period)|WD=Q1143910|lt=Kōji|1=Kōji (Muromachi period)}} 3rd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1557|en|1557|WD=Q6595|lt=1557|1=1557}} {{ill|September 27|en|September 27|WD=Q2884|lt=September 27|1=September 27}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Emperor Go-Nara|en|Emperor Go-Nara|WD=Q349467|lt=Go-Nara|1=Emperor Go-Nara}} , the 105th emperor (* {{ill|1496|en|1496|WD=Q6699|lt=1496|1=1496}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|WD=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō|1=Tenpō}} 5th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1834|en|1834|WD=Q7591|lt=1834|1=1834}} {{ill|November 21|en|November 21|WD=Q3023|lt=November 21|1=November 21}} ） – {{ill|Sakai Tadayoshi (Isesaki Domain)|ja|酒井忠良 (伊勢崎藩主)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sakai Tadayoshi (Isesaki Domain)|1=Sakai Tadakata|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11644167}} , the lord of the Isesaki Domain (* {{ill|1808|en|1808|WD=Q6914|lt=1808|1=1808}} ).
